overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking across a medieval stone bridge toward a castle gate. The scene features overcast weather, foggy atmosphere, and medieval architecture with guards and villagers populating the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval stone bridge with wooden railings

events.description: guard in red armor passes by on the right side, temporarily blocking view of the railing
approaching the end of the bridge where wooden houses become visible

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the stone bridge toward the distant castle towers visible through the mist

notable_agents.action: guard in red armor and helmet leaning on bridge railing, then walking past the camera
distant figure in dark clothing walking ahead on the bridge toward the castle

entered.detail: irregular cobblestone bridge surface with weathered stones
dark wooden fence railings with vertical posts along the bridge edge
dark wooden fence railings with vertical posts along the bridge edge
tall stone towers with red pointed roofs visible through the atmospheric fog

segments.scene_description: The character walks across a medieval stone bridge with dark wooden railings, passing a guard in red armor who leans on the railing. The cobblestone path stretches ahead toward distant castle towers shrouded in mist, with another figure visible walking in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: village outskirts with wooden houses and birch trees

events.description: exits the bridge and enters the village area with wooden houses appearing on the right
passes close to a guard standing by a wooden fence on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the cobblestone path through the village outskirts, passing wooden structures and guards

notable_agents.action: guard in red armor standing stationary by a wooden fence watching the path
group of villagers and guards gathered ahead near the castle entrance

entered.detail: rustic log cabin with thatched roof and wooden beams
white-barked trees with sparse autumn foliage lining the path
tall fortified stone wall running parallel to the village path

segments.scene_description: Leaving the bridge behind, the path continues through village outskirts with rustic wooden houses and birch trees. The character passes a guard standing watch by a fence, while the castle walls run parallel on the left and the towers shift to the left side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle gate approach with stone archway and portcullis

events.description: the castle gate with raised portcullis becomes the dominant feature ahead
slight path adjustment to follow the curving cobblestone road toward the gate entrance

agents.ego_description: approaching the castle gate, moving toward the entrance with other villagers

notable_agents.action: villager in brown dress carrying a basket walking ahead toward the gate
armed guards in red armor standing watch at the castle entrance under the arch

entered.detail: large stone archway with raised iron portcullis and wooden supports
fortified stone building with red roof and heraldic banners

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the imposing castle gate with its raised iron portcullis visible through the stone archway. Guards stand watch at the entrance as villagers gather to enter, with the fortified stone gatehouse now prominent on the left and the castle walls towering nearby.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a misty stone bridge toward the imposing entrance of a fortified castle. It begins with the character crossing a cobblestone bridge flanked by dark wooden railings and a guard in red armor, while distant towers loom through a thick fog. As the bridge is left behind, the path transitions into the village outskirts, passing rustic wooden houses and birch trees while the castle walls begin to run parallel to the left. The scene then shifts toward the massive stone gatehouse, where the camera approaches a raised iron portcullis and guards standing watch. Finally, the perspective settles on the bustling entrance as villagers gather to pass through the towering stone archway.
